title: Buqqiy #1231
definition:
Bukki = "wasting"

 1) son of Abishua and father of Uzzi, fifth from Aaron in the line of
    the high priests
 2) son of Jogli, prince of the tribe of Dan, one of the ten men chosen
    to apportion the land of Canaan between the tribes
